AI.tldr: 本文研究了在上下文不确定性环境下多机器人协调规划的问题，提出了一种分两阶段的解决方案以实现安全高效的多机器人任务执行。
AI.motivation: 现实中的机器人常需在未知上下文环境中运行，错误的上下文假设会导致任务目标冲突和安全隐患，亟需通过协同观测推断真实上下文后再进行规划。
AI.method: 提出MR-CUSSP问题建模框架，包含两个阶段：CIMOP算法用于引导机器人采集信息以推断上下文，LCBS算法基于推断结果进行带优先级的无碰撞路径规划。
AI.result: 在三个模拟领域验证了算法有效性，并通过五机器人salp实验展示了方法的实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效应对上下文不确定性挑战，在保证安全的前提下实现了多机器人系统的高效协同规划。

title: Designing for Understanding: How Interface-Level Consent Designs Shape Attention and Understanding in Privacy Disclosures
comment: 6 PAGES, 2 FIGURES, 1 TABLE. Published in the Extended Abstracts of the 2026 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI EA 2026)
summary: Privacy policies are intended to support informed consent, yet users rarely read them fully. This study examines how common privacy policy interface structures influence attention allocation, reading behavior, and perceived experience. Using eye-tracking and post-task surveys, we compared three interface designs: continuous scrolling text, collapsible sections, and collapsible sections with brief previews. Results show that interface structure systematically shaped how users allocated attention and navigated policy content, but did not uniformly improve comprehension. Guided layouts supported more efficient and coherent reading patterns, whereas more interactive designs elicited higher perceived engagement and satisfaction. Importantly, comprehension was closely linked to sustained attention rather than interface type alone. These findings highlight the limits of interface-centered consent approaches and suggest that effective consent design must account for attention dynamics and selective engagement, rather than assuming that improved layout alone ensures understanding.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了隐私政策界面设计如何影响用户注意力分配、阅读行为及理解程度，比较了三种不同界面结构的效果。
AI.motivation: 隐私政策旨在支持用户知情同意，但用户极少完整阅读，需探索更有效的界面设计以提升隐私披露的可理解性。
AI.method: 通过眼动追踪技术和任务后问卷调查，对比分析连续滚动文本、可折叠章节及带简要预览的可折叠章节三种界面设计。
AI.result: 界面结构显著影响用户注意力分配和阅读模式，但未统一提升理解度；引导式布局促进高效阅读，交互式设计提升参与感，而理解度与持续注意力密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 单纯优化界面布局无法确保用户理解，有效同意设计需结合注意力动态与选择性参与机制，而非仅依赖界面改进。

title: Multi-Object Advertisement Creative Generation
summary: Lifestyle images are photographs that capture environments and objects in everyday settings. In furniture product marketing, advertisers often create lifestyle images containing products to resonate with potential buyers, allowing buyers to visualize how the products fit into their daily lives. While recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) have given rise to realistic image content creation, their application in e-commerce advertising is challenging because high-quality ads must authentically representing the products in realistic scearios. Therefore, manual intervention is usually required for individual generations, making it difficult to scale to larger product catalogs. To understand the challenges faced by advertisers using GenAI to create lifestyle images at scale, we conducted evaluations on ad images generated using state-of-the-art image generation models and identified the major challenges. Based on our findings, we present CreativeAds, a multi-product ad creation system that supports scalable automated generation with customized parameter adjustment for individual generation. To ensure automated high-quality ad generation, CreativeAds innovates a pipeline that consists of three modules to address challenges in product pairing, layout generation, and background generation separately. Furthermore, CreativeAds contains an intuitive user interface to allow users to oversee generation at scale, and it also supports detailed controls on individual generation for user customized adjustments. We performed a user study on CreativeAds and extensive evaluations of the generated images, demonstrating CreativeAds's ability to create large number of high-quality images at scale for advertisers without requiring expertise in GenAI tools.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CreativeAds的多产品广告创意生成系统，通过自动化流程解决电商广告中大规模生成高质量生活方式图片的挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI在图像创作领域取得进展，但电商广告需要真实场景中多产品组合的高质量图片，现有方法依赖人工干预难以扩展，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含产品配对、布局生成和背景生成三个模块的流水线，结合直观用户界面与细粒度参数控制，实现可扩展的自动化广告生成。
AI.result: 用户研究和图像评估表明，CreativeAds可批量生成高质量广告图片，且无需用户具备生成式AI专业知识即可完成定制化调整。
AI.conclusion: CreativeAds通过模块化流水线和用户交互设计，有效解决了多对象广告大规模生成中的质量与扩展性矛盾，为电商广告创作提供自动化工具。

title: Research Paradigm of Materials Science Tetrahedra with Artificial Intelligence
summary: The classical material tetrahedron that represents the Structure-Property-Processing-Performance-Characterization relationship is the most important research paradigm in materials science so far. It has served as a protocol to guide experiments, modeling, and theory to uncover hidden relationships between various aspects of a certain material. This substantially facilitates knowledge accumulation and material discovery with desired functionalities to realize versatile applications. In recent years, with the advent of artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, the attention of AI towards scientific research is soaring. The trials of implementing AI in various disciplines are endless, with great potential to revolutionize the research diagram. Despite the success in natural language processing and computer vision, how to effectively integrate AI with natural science is still a grand challenge, bearing in mind their fundamental differences. Inspired by these observations and limitations, we delve into the current research paradigm dictated by the classical material tetrahedron and propose two new paradigms to stimulate data-driven and AI-augmented research. One tetrahedron focuses on AI for materials science by considering the Matter-Data-Model-Potential-Agent diagram. The other demonstrates AI research by discussing Data-Architecture-Encoding-Optimization-Inference relationships. The crucial ingredients of these frameworks and their connections are discussed, which will likely motivate both scientific thinking refinement and technology advancement. Despite the widespread enthusiasm for chasing AI for science, we must analyze issues rationally to come up with well-defined, resolvable scientific problems in order to better master the power of AI.

AI.tldr: 探讨将人工智能（AI）整合到材料科学传统四面体研究范式中的方法，并提出两种新的AI增强型研究范式。
AI.motivation: 传统四面体范式在AI整合方面存在挑战，需探索数据驱动和AI增强的新研究范式以推动材料科学进步。
AI.method: 提出两种新的四面体框架：物质-数据-模型-潜在-代理和数据-架构-编码-优化-推理，分析其关键要素及关联。
AI.result: 构建了两种AI增强型研究范式，明确了关键要素及关联，为数据驱动的材料科学研究提供新思路。
AI.conclusion: 强调需理性分析AI整合的科学问题，推动材料科学理论与技术的协同发展。

title: Ego-1K -- A Large-Scale Multiview Video Dataset for Egocentric Vision
summary: We present Ego-1K, a large-scale collection of time-synchronized egocentric multiview videos designed to advance neural 3D video synthesis and dynamic scene understanding. The dataset contains nearly 1,000 short egocentric videos captured with a custom rig with 12 synchronized cameras surrounding a 4-camera VR headset worn by the user. Scene content focuses on hand motions and hand-object interactions in different settings. We describe rig design, data processing, and calibration. Our dataset enables new ways to benchmark egocentric scene reconstruction methods, an important research area as smart glasses with multiple cameras become omnipresent. Our experiments demonstrate that our dataset presents unique challenges for existing 3D and 4D novel view synthesis methods due to large disparities and image motion caused by close dynamic objects and rig egomotion. Our dataset supports future research in this challenging domain. It is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/facebook/ego-1k.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ego-1K数据集，包含1000个同步多视角第一人称视频，用于推动神经3D视频合成和动态场景理解研究。
AI.motivation: 随着多摄像头智能眼镜的普及，需要基准数据集验证第一人称场景重建方法，现有技术在近距离动态物体和设备自运动场景下存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用定制化12摄像头 rigs 围绕4摄像头VR头显进行同步拍摄，聚焦手部动作与物体交互场景，包含rig设计、数据处理和校准方法。
AI.result: 实验表明现有3D/4D新视角合成方法在该数据集面临巨大挑战，主要受近距离动态物体运动和设备自运动引起的视差与图像运动影响。
AI.conclusion: Ego-1K为第一人称视觉研究提供新基准，支持未来在复杂动态场景下的算法创新，数据集已公开获取。

title: Sky2Ground: A Benchmark for Site Modeling under Varying Altitude
summary: We introduce Sky2Ground, a three-view dataset designed for varying altitude camera localization, correspondence learning, and reconstruction. The dataset combines structured synthetic imagery with real, in-the-wild images, providing both controlled multi-view geometry and realistic scene noise. Each of the 51 sites contains thousands of satellite, aerial, and ground images spanning wide altitude ranges and nearly orthogonal viewing angles, enabling rigorous evaluation across global-to-local contexts. We benchmark state of the art pose estimation models, including MASt3R, DUSt3R, Map Anything, and VGGT, and observe that the use of satellite imagery often degrades performance, highlighting the challenges under large altitude variations. We also examine reconstruction methods, highlighting the challenges introduced by sparse geometric overlap, varying perspectives, and the use of real imagery, which often introduces noise and reduces rendering quality. To address some of these challenges, we propose SkyNet, a model which enhances cross-view consistency when incorporating satellite imagery with a curriculum-based training strategy to progressively incorporate more satellite views. SkyNet significantly strengthens multi-view alignment and outperforms existing methods by 9.6% on RRA@5 and 18.1% on RTA@5 in terms of absolute performance. Sky2Ground and SkyNet together establish a comprehensive testbed and baseline for advancing large-scale, multi-altitude 3D perception and generalizable camera localization. Code and models will be released publicly for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sky2Ground数据集和SkyNet模型，用于解决多海拔环境下站点建模与相机定位的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理跨大范围海拔的多视角图像时存在性能下降问题，尤其卫星图像引入的噪声和视角差异导致重建质量降低。
AI.method: 构建包含卫星/航拍/地面图像的三视图数据集，设计SkyNet模型通过课程学习策略逐步融合卫星视角，增强跨视图一致性。
AI.result: SkyNet在RRA@5指标上提升9.6%，RTA@5指标提升18.1%，并建立首个多海拔3D感知基准测试平台。
AI.conclusion: Sky2Ground与SkyNet为多尺度环境下的相机定位和重建提供了系统性研究框架，代码与模型将开源促进后续研究。

title: UniVid: Pyramid Diffusion Model for High Quality Video Generation
summary: Diffusion-based text-to-video generation (T2V) or image-to-video (I2V) generation have emerged as a prominent research focus. However, there exists a challenge in integrating the two generative paradigms into a unified model. In this paper, we present a unified video generation model (UniVid) with hybrid conditions of the text prompt and reference image. Given these two available controls, our model can extract objects' appearance and their motion descriptions from textual prompts, while obtaining texture details and structural information from image clues to guide the video generation process. Specifically, we scale up the pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model for generating temporally coherent frames via introducing our temporal-pyramid cross-frame spatial-temporal attention modules and convolutions. To support bimodal control, we introduce a dual-stream cross-attention mechanism, whose attention scores can be freely re-weighted for interpolation of between single and two modalities controls during inference. Extensive experiments showcase that our UniVid achieves superior temporal coherence on T2V, I2V and (T+I)2V tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的视频生成模型UniVid，通过结合文本提示和参考图像的混合条件，实现高质量的视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到视频（T2V）和图像到视频（I2V）生成模型难以有效整合两种生成范式，导致时间一致性不足和控制模态单一的问题。
AI.method: 通过扩展预训练文本到图像扩散模型，引入时序金字塔跨帧时空注意力模块和卷积，并设计双流交叉注意力机制以实现文本与图像模态的灵活权重调节。
AI.result: 实验表明，UniVid在T2V、I2V及结合文本与图像的（T+I）2V任务中均取得了更优的时间一致性表现。
AI.conclusion: UniVid通过统一多模态控制实现了更高质量和灵活的视频生成，为未来视频生成模型提供了新方向。

title: Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Real-time Generative Model Predictive Control
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026. Project page: https://kir-.github.io/GMPC-IMLE/
summary: Diffusion-based models have recently shown strong performance in trajectory planning, as they are capable of capturing diverse, multimodal distributions of complex behaviors. A key limitation of these models is their slow inference speed, which results from the iterative denoising process. This makes them less suitable for real-time applications such as closed-loop model predictive control (MPC), where plans must be generated quickly and adapted continuously to a changing environment. In this paper, we investigate Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) as an alternative generative modeling approach for planning. IMLE offers strong mode coverage while enabling inference that is two orders of magnitude faster, making it particularly well suited for real-time MPC tasks. Our results demonstrate that IMLE achieves competitive performance on standard offline reinforcement learning benchmarks compared to the standard diffusion-based planner, while substantially improving planning speed in both open-loop and closed-loop settings. We further validate IMLE in a closed-loop human navigation scenario, operating in real-time, demonstrating how it enables rapid and adaptive plan generation in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）的生成模型预测控制方法，以解决扩散模型在实时轨迹规划中的推理速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽然在轨迹规划中表现出色，但其迭代去噪过程导致推理速度慢，难以满足实时闭环模型预测控制（MPC）的需求。
AI.method: 本文采用隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）作为生成建模方法，以提高推理速度并实现快速、自适应的轨迹规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，IMLE在标准离线强化学习基准测试中表现与扩散模型相当，同时在开环和闭环环境中显著提升了规划速度，并在闭环人类导航场景中验证了其实时性。
AI.conclusion: IMLE是一种适用于实时生成模型预测控制的高效方法，能够在动态环境中实现快速且自适应的轨迹规划。

title: LPV-MPC for Lateral Control in Full-Scale Autonomous Racing
summary: Autonomous racing has attracted significant attention recently, presenting challenges in selecting an optimal controller that operates within the onboard system's computational limits and meets operational constraints such as limited track time and high costs. This paper introduces a Linear Parameter-Varying Model Predictive Controller (LPV-MPC) for lateral control. Implemented on an IAC AV-24, the controller achieved stable performance at speeds exceeding 160 mph (71.5 m/s). We detail the controller design, the methodology for extracting model parameters, and key system-level and implementation considerations. Additionally, we report results from our final race run, providing a comprehensive analysis of both vehicle dynamics and controller performance. A Python implementation of the framework is available at: https://tinyurl.com/LPV-MPC-acados

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种线性参数变化模型预测控制器（LPV-MPC），用于全尺寸自动驾驶赛车的横向控制，并在IAC AV-24车辆上实现了超过160mph的稳定性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶赛车面临控制器计算资源限制、赛道时间有限及高成本等挑战，需开发满足实时性和约束条件的高效控制方法。
AI.method: 设计LPV-MPC控制器架构，通过参数辨识获取车辆动力学模型，结合系统级实现细节（如计算优化），并在实际赛车中部署验证。
AI.result: 控制器在160mph以上实现稳定操控，最终比赛运行数据验证了车辆动力学与控制性能，开源了Python实现框架。
AI.conclusion: LPV-MPC有效平衡了计算效率与控制精度，为自动驾驶赛车提供了可行的横向控制方案，且开源代码促进技术复用。
